posts.text:
It looks like they might be sending the pagers back.


Trey Yingst (@TreyYingst)

Video circulating from Northern Israel tonight.

Video
  




— https://nitter.net/TreyYingst/status/2031814411044659441#m

On @TheYoungTurks on Friday at 7pm ET, @FmrRepMTG and @ninaturner. Let’s unite this country! Marjorie Taylor Greene and Bernie’s Co-Chair. There will be disagreements, but there will also be agreements! We’re going to unite on things we all agree on and serve American citizens!

If Trump and the Israel First donors can defeat @RepThomasMassie, then principles have no meaning. There's no question who is the more principled conservative between Massie and Trump. This is a test of whether money and Trump name can defeat all of MAGA's original principles?


Aaron Rupar (@atrupar)

Trump: "I predict that 'Representative'Thomas Massie will go down as the WORST Republican Congressman in the long and fabled history of the United States Congress, even worse than Crazy Liz Chaney

The way Israelis have treated Palestinians is the biggest crime against humanity in my lifetime. It's not an isolated terrorist act. It is a sick, tyrannical oppression that has lasted 78 years. 

First, they ethnically cleansed 750,000 Palestinians in 1948. They slaughtered them and drove them from their land and their family homes. Then they kept Palestinians in open air camps as their prisoners for 58 years. 

Meanwhile, the American press pretended Israel was in danger, Israel was the victim

Btw, Israel has a giant gas field they recently opened up called Leviathan. For now, they closed it because of the war. But in the long run, Israel would be a significant beneficiary of higher energy prices.

Iran hit three cargo ships in the Strait of Hormuz. 20% of the world's oil used to go through that strait. It doesn't anymore. Buckle up, brace for impact. Price of gas is going way up. It turns out war has consequences.

Israel is getting hit pretty badly right now. They're not talking about it since they don't want anyone thinking the war is going poorly. But soon they'll switch to victim mode. You'll see all over your TV, "Poor, poor Israel is being attacked by evil Iran." Um, they started it.

Tonight on @TheYoungTurks we're going to to talk about the conflicting information about whether this war is going to be shorter than expected or if we're putting in ground troops! Also @joerogan says the war is insane, @piersmorgan battles Israel First. 6PM ET on YouTube.

Holy shit, they just released number of US troops injured so far in the war - 150!!! 

Number they gave before was 7 dead and 8 injured. So, they were definitely hiding these numbers. 

Why? This war is unpopular, and unnecessary. They didn't want you to see true scale of damage.

Israel First has been used to canceling anyone they like. And when they put a hit on someone and called them an antisemite, that used to be the end of your career in media. No one can deny that. For at least a 40 year stretch, no one survived an accusation of antisemitism, whether it was justified or not.

This allowed them to cancel all of Israel's critics, so they could never speak again in national media. But now, there are too many of us. And their whack a mole strategy isn't working, so the

If Israel is losing this war and Iran does not accept a ceasefire, our work is still done there. We knocked out everything we could. Now, regime change seems impossible. So, good luck Israel! I heard from the Israelis that if you start a war, then you deserve everything you get.

Tonight on @TheYoungTurks, ISRAEL IS WORRIED THEY'RE STARTING TO LOSE THE WAR! This is an enormous development. A rift developing within Israeli government. Israelis panicking about inadequate defenses appears to be driving Trump  to say war might end quicker. 6PM ET on Youtube.

Ok, this makes more sense. Trump talking about shortening the war seemed like he was standing up to the Israelis, which is near impossible. It turns out the ISRAELIS ARE PANICKING ABOUT THE WAR. So, he’s still following their orders. Apparently, Israel just found out about FAFO.


Philip Pilkington (@philippilk)

Israeli officials seem to be in a panic. They are leaking about off-ramps to the Washington Post. The Israelis had a “magic” conception of American power. Now that they see there are no

I think he's likely saying anything to get the markets to go back up (they did after he made these statements). I think Israel might be worried about defending their mainland and we might be running low on interceptors for our ships. But no matter the reason, I'll be thrilled.

Trump is all over the place. He is now saying he's going to kill the new Supreme Leader and Iran has to meet all his demands (they aren't budging on any of the demands). And now he says we might withdraw. If he does withdraw soon, I'll definitely give him credit for that.


Weijia Jiang (@weijia)

NEW—In a phone interview, President Trump told me the war could be over soon: “I think the war is very complete, pretty much. They have no navy, no communications, they’ve got no Air Force.” He added t

Powerful video of the kids killed in strike on school in Iran by @bravenewfilms. How much we spent to kill these kids is heartbreaking. We are constantly told there's no money for projects that help American citizens and then we spend money to start these wars and kill innocents.


Brave New Films (@bravenewfilms)

165 children killed. Most were girls between 7–12. War has a cost. Children are paying it.

INVESTIGATE NOW - Write and call and visit your elected representative.
Tell them they must

What’s so frustrating is that we spend all this time debating nonsensical things because Israel First demands that everyone take their bullshit talking points seriously. So, most of media pretended it was a legitimate point that we might bomb the Iranians in order to “help them.”


Glenn Greenwald (@ggreenwald)

A huge crowd of Iranians assembles in Revolution Square in Tehran to express gratitude and love for Israel and the US, heralding them as liberators.

Oh, it's actually to commemorate the
